svg.title: BFF infrastructure tier diagram
svg.desc: Request flows from Internet through Azure Front Door edge, to BFF pods sharing cookie keys via Key Vault, to API pods, to SQL MI and Redis. BFF pods use OIDC with Entra ID.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How should Azure Front Door be configured to protect the BFF from internet traffic?')
sendPrompt('What WAF rules and rate limiting should Azure Front Door apply before traffic reaches the BFF?')
sendPrompt('What does each BFF pod handle? Walk me through authentication, proxy, and antiforgery responsibilities.')
sendPrompt('How do multiple BFF pods share session state without sticky sessions?')
sendPrompt('How should KEDA autoscaling be configured for BFF pods on Azure Container Apps?')
sendPrompt('How should BFF pods share ASP.NET Core Data Protection keys via Azure Key Vault to avoid cookie decryption failures across pods?')
sendPrompt('What is the API tier responsible for in this BFF architecture and how should it validate the forwarded session token?')
sendPrompt('How should API pods scale independently from BFF pods in Azure Container Apps?')
sendPrompt('What SQL Managed Instance configuration is recommended for multi-tenant isolation with row-level security?')
sendPrompt('How should Redis be used in this architecture — for session cache, distributed dedup, or both?')
sendPrompt('How does the BFF OIDC flow with Entra ID work — what does the BFF do with the tokens it receives?')
